title: Decorative sheet, structure including a decorative sheet and method for producing a decorative sheet
abstract: A decorative sheet capable of yielding high surface quality when attached to a substrate by a vacuum-pressure molding method or an injection molding method. The decorative sheet comprises a decorative layer including a printing surface having concavities and convexities; and a smoothing resin layer disposed on the printing surface of the decorative layer or above the decorative layer, wherein the surface of the smoothing resin layer is smoother than the printing surface.
claims: Claims What is Claimed is: 1. A decorative sheet to be attached to a substrate by a vacuum-pressure molding method or an injection molding method, the decorative sheet comprising: a decorative layer including a printing surface having concavities and convexities; and a smoothing resin layer disposed on the printing surface of the decorative layer or above the decorative layer; wherein a surface of the smoothing resin layer is smoother than the printing surface. 2. The decorative sheet according to claim 1, wherein a surface roughness Rzl of the printing surface of the decorative layer is not less than 0.2 Î¼Î¹ÏÎ¹, and a surface roughness Rz2 of the smoothing resin layer is not greater than 0.95 times Rzl . 3. The decorative sheet according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the printing surface is a gravure printing surface. 4. The decorative sheet according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the smoothing resin layer has a storage modulus from 1 x 10 6 Pa to 1.5 x 10 8 Pa in a temperature range from 100Â°C to 150Â°C when measured under stretched mode conditions at a frequency of 10 Hz. 5. The decorative sheet according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein the smoothing resin layer contains a polyurethane or an acrylic resin. 6. A structure comprising a substrate and the decorative sheet according to any one of claims 1 to 5 applied to a surface of the substrate. 7. A method for producing a decorative sheet to be attached to a substrate by a vacuum- pressure molding method or an injection molding method, the method comprising: forming a decorative layer including a printing surface having concavities and convexities; and forming a smoothing resin layer on the printing surface of the decorative layer or above the decorative layer and forming a surface of the smoothing resin layer to be smoother than the printing surface.
